etymology.description: 氵(水, 'water') + 尃(尃, 'elaborate') = widespread distribution of water -> widespread
etymology.interpretation: The character 溥(pǔ, 'widespread') combines the semantic element 氵(水, 'water') with the phonetic element 尃(尃, 'elaborate'). This reflects the idea of something spreading or being distributed extensively, much like water can flow and cover a large area, indicating a broad or widespread scope.
